detaileddescription.para: Session setting describing the matchmaking channel that is used for a matchmaking ticket.
Matchmaking query setting describing whether the matchmaking call was made directly by the user or if it was made by a remote player (ex. party leader).

sect1.title: Matchmaking query setting representing the sub game mode that we want to match with.

memberdef.type: bool bool bool bool DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnReadyConsentRequested, FString) typedef FOnReadyConsentRequested typedef FOnMatchmakingStarted::FDelegate
memberdef.definition: bool bool bool bool DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam (FOnReadyConsentRequested, FString ) typedef FOnReadyConsentRequested typedef FOnMatchmakingStarted::FDelegate FOnMatchmakingStartedDelegate
memberdef.name: FOnMatchmakingStartedDelegate

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we need to send a ready consent message to the matchmaker to join a match.
Normally, you'll either want to just call SessionInt->SendReady(MatchId) if you don't care if players ready up, or have UI to send an explicit ready. Delegate fired when matchmaking has started.
Delegate fired when deregistering a server from Armada finishes Delegate fired when a request to send a ready consent to the matchmaker finishes
Delegate fired when a request to enqueue a joinable session completes Delegate fired when a request to dequeue a joinable session completes
Delegate fired when a request to query information on a dedicated matchmaking session completes Delegate fired when request to remove user from session completes
Delegate fired when a request to post event to session browser that a match has started completes #SG Delegate fired when a request to drop a player from a session completes
Delegate fired when a DS notification has been received from the Lobby websocket.
